v11-01-build.task: Replace in-memory stores with Supabase queries
v11-01-build.summary: Added Supabase persistence to rate limiter, replaced inline Maps in gemini-image.ts with shared module, added webhook_events and rate_limits tables to schema and types. All data stores already used Supabase.

v11-05-build.summary: Added @sentry/nextjs with safe DSN guards: sentry.client.config.ts, sentry.server.config.ts, sentry.edge.config.ts all check for DSN before init. Instrumentation hook in src/instrumentation.ts loads configs per runtime. global-error.tsx reports to Sentry when DSN set. Does NOT use withSentryConfig() wrapper (learned from a-startup-biz crash). .env.example updated with SENTRY_ORG/SENTRY_PROJECT placeholders.

v11-02-build.summary: Email verification flow was mostly implemented by prior commits. Added: users table with email_verified column and auth.users sync trigger to schema.sql, POST handler to verify-email API route for client-side AJAX verification, updated verify-email page to show 'check your email' message post-signup. Dashboard banner for unverified users was already in place. Build passes with zero new type errors.

v11-03-build.summary: Password reset flow was already fully implemented: forgot-password API route (Supabase resetPasswordForEmail), reset-password API route (updateUser), auth/callback handler (code exchange with recovery detection), frontend pages for forgot-password and reset-password, and Forgot password? link on login page. Added: password_reset_tokens table to schema.sql, success/error banners on login page for verified/resetSuccess/urlError states, fixed pre-existing Sentry import build error in global-error.tsx.
